sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n16355" key="a)spa/raktos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀσπάρακτος</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">πᾰ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>,</foreign> <sense id="n16355.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">not causing laceration,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">τάσις</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Heliod.</author> </bibl> </cit>(?)ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:49:4:46" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">49.4.46</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
